description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neck, short sleeves with stitched detailing on the cuffs and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron With a clean cut and a neat finish that offers a flattering silhouette, this T-shirt from wrangler offers a casual yet stylish vibe. The soft cotton fabric together with the graphic print make it a to-die-for buy. Pair it with jeans, shorts or a skirt and sporty footwear for absolute style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
